event: Moonlit night over St. Petersburg harbor
description: A hazy nocturnal harbor scene bathed in golden moonlight. A full moon glows through thin clouds at upper left, casting a long reflection on calm water. A tall-masted sailing ship is silhouetted at the left, while smaller boats and figures populate the foreground shoreline at right. A domed structure or fortress with a spire rises at the right edge. Buildings and masts fade into the golden mist across the far shore. The entire scene is rendered in warm amber and gold tones.
